title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DXC Technology India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DXC Technology India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!
